creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Michal Meloun from comment #4)

I need to get some sleep. And none of my recent testing is
based on my builds, just on an official snapshot. I'll need
to learn how my builds behave for the comparison/contrast
with your patches. It is going to be a while before I have
anything to report.

I will use my debug builds (that I normally do not install).
I do not plan on updating the commit my context is based on.
